description: Size Ratio Packing: one box mixes sizes in a ratio that sums to Packing Combo. Size Wise Packing: each size is packed in its own box with its own pieces per box.

name: Item Production Detail-packing_mode
options:
Size Ratio Packing
Size Wise Packing
